sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36206" key="e)ntereu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐντερ-εύω</orth>, <sense id="n36206.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gut</tr_> fish, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0417.tlg001:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
